jd_text: When you click apply, you will be redirected to the company’s website . Please ensure you have completed the company’s application process on their platform to fully apply. About Our Client We are working with a leading global investment firm based in Abu Dhabi, backed by substantial long-term capital and an institutional mandate across private equity and real assets. The firm operates with a disciplined, committee-driven investment framework and partners closely with top-tier sponsors, advisors, and management teams globally. As the platform continues to scale, they are looking to appoint a Vice President to play a key role within their investment team. What the job involves Supporting the team head in shaping investment views, capital allocation priorities, and portfolio construction decisions Leading evaluation of new investment opportunities, including underwriting oversight, valuation logic, scenario analysis, and portfolio impact assessment Guiding diligence and execution processes in coordination with internal teams and external advisors Leading industry, market, and thematic research to inform investment strategy and opportunity assessment Overseeing portfolio monitoring for designated investments, identifying performance trends, risks, and value-creation opportunities Preparing and presenting investment materials, portfolio reviews, and recommendations to Investment Committees and senior governance forums Providing day-to-day guidance and quality review of work produced by Associates and Analysts Who we are looking for An experienced investment professional from tier 1 private equity, institutional investing or asset management background Experience leading control / majority investments is essential Strong background across investment evaluation, research, and portfolio oversight, with comfort operating in committee-led decision frameworks Commercial, analytical, and articulate, with the ability to engage confidently with senior stakeholders and external advisors Academically strong, with a degree in finance, economics, business, or a related discipline; professional qualifications (e.g. CFA, CAIA, ACCA) are advantageous You will be redirected to the company’s website – you must complete the application on their platform to apply.
